title: User Profiles and Avatar Management
description: Build user profile pages displaying user information, their uploaded photos in a grid, follower/following counts, and bio. Implement profile editing including display name, bio, and avatar upload. Create the profile URL structure (/u/[username] or /profile/[id]). Show appropriate states for own profile vs. viewing others. Implement avatar upload with cropping/resizing. Out of scope: follow/unfollow buttons (separate task), settings page.
